_comment: Clickable link zones over the art, as PERCENTAGES of each page image so they scale responsively. Origin top-left; x/y = top-left corner, w/h = size, all in % of image width/height. Boxes below are calibrated against assets/page-1.png (1366x1841). To visually check placement, uncomment the .hotspot background rule in build_site.py and rebuild. URLs marked TODO are skipped by the build until you set them.
